creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Lexi Winter from comment #7)
^Triage: I have marked this as "In Progress".

I do not want to close it yet because it tells me that PRs about rc scripts
need to be re-evaluated to see if their patches need to be re-based.

patchQA.py does not handle things in conf/ correctly yet anyway, but this is
now another blocker for its widespread adoption.
